calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amber Griffiths for (trustee) Thomas Lucas.

The Court stated that this is an amended petition to confirm a successor trustee and assets. Ms. Griffiths reported that the family has not contested and is in favor of appointing a successor trustee and that waivers were signed. The Court addressed service of the amended petition, that it raises questions as the notice of service preceded the filing and that the waivers do not refer to the amended petition. Ms. Griffiths stated that she has been trying to work with the heirs, that they cooperate but are not always quick with returning documents, that she apologizes for jumping the gun and that they have all received endorsed copies. The Court stated that the proof of service of the amended petition should have gone out after filing the amended petition and that the waiver did not indicate all future filings. Ms. Griffiths stated that she is trying to understand the waiver and that it only includes today's hearing but did not state amended petition. The Court stated that the waivers need to be clear and that it does not have an issue with the substance of disregarding the will for the trust. Ms. Griffiths stated that she can get proper waivers and that she did not think a proof of service was necessary for the waiver itself. The Court took the petition for order to confirm successor trustee and trust assets under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
